x-enumeration-literals.name: Issuer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Legal entity that has the right to issue the financial instrument (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Portfolio Manager
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party responsible for investing another party's assets and for managing the day-to-day operations. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Advisor
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party that provides investment guidance at a fee. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Warrant Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Entity appointed by the issuer to process the exercising of warrants, sometimes responsible for the issuance of the warrants into the market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Trader
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A trader is an individual who engages in the buying and selling of financial assets in any financial market, either for themself or on behalf of another person or institution. 
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/t/trader.asp

x-enumeration-literals.name: Trustee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Legal owner of the property. However, the beneficiary has the equitable or beneficial ownership. The trustee must ensure all terms and conditions of the security are adhered to. ISO20022
https://www.iso20022.org/standardsrepository/type/TrusteeRole
